titleStmt.title: SII 38.437: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 437. (A.R. No. 437 of 1912.) TIRUPPĀLATTUṞAI, PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the west verandah, the first prākāra, Kshīravanēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription registers a gift of 3 mā of land after purchase by Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ alias Simapeṟṟarayaṉ to the god Tirujñānasambandiśuramuḍaiyār, which was consecreated by the donor's father Poruvaṉūr-uḍaiyān, Arayankāṟaiaḻagaṉ alias Nīlagaṅgaraiyan in the western prākāra of the temple at Tiruppālattuṟai. The produce of the land donated after remitting, the tax dēvadānakaḍamai was to be utilized for providing food offerings at the rate of 2 nāḻi of rice per day and also for burning a twilight lamp. The Śivabrāhmaṇas (worshipping priests) of thirty cycle, who received the said land, agreed to maintain the endowment.
The accountant of the temple Sūlamaṅgalam-uḍaiyāṉ Siṅgapirāṉ Kuṉṟameṟindaperumāṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī[rājarāja]tevaṟkku
yāṇṭu 2 10 8 nittaviṉotavaḷanāṭṭu nallūrnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
tiruppālaittuṟaiyuṭaiyār koyil kiḻaittirunaṭaimā
ḷikaiyil poruvaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ kāṟaiaḻakaṉāṉa nilaka
ṅkarayaṉ Eḻuntaruḷivitta Uṭaiyār tiruñāṉacampanticuramuṭaiyā
rkku Ivar makaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa cimapeṟṟarayaṉ
vilai koṇṭu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka tanta Innāyaṉār te
vatāṉam tirucciṟṟampalanallūr ḷraRead as rājakempīranallūril [ja*]kempīranallūril cempaṅ
kuṭaiyāṉ nampiyāḻvāṉ tevakaḷ ceṉā(pati)patip pal
lavarayar pāriāṇṭavaḷ taṉuṭaṉpiṟanta Āṟumukappe
rumāḷai mutukaṇṇāka koṇṭu viṟṟa nilattukku kiḻpā
rkkellai ḷraDo rājacūriyamārāyaṉ [ja*]cūriyamārāyaṉ nilattukku meṟkkum
teṉpāṟkkellai kulottuṅkacoḻavāykkā
lukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai tiruviḷakkupuṟattukku
m vaṭapāṟkkellai kāveri Āṟṟaṅkaraikku teṟkku
m naṭuvupaṭṭa viḷai » mūṉṟumā Innilamuṉṟumāvum Etirāmāṇ
ṭu kārmutal kaikkoṇṭu Aṭaimutal varicaikku Uḻa
aṭuttu Uṭaiyār tiruppālaittuṟaiuṭaiyārkku
tevatāṉakkaṭamaiyum Iṟuttu yiṟai miku
ti koṇṭu Innāyaṉārkku tiruamutupaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Iru
nāḻiyākavanta Ariciyum Oru tirucanti viḷakkum Upaiyamākac
celuttak kaṭavomāka Icaintu muppatuvaṭṭattu civappirāma
ṇarum tiṭṭutarukaṉil Innilam muṉṟu māvum tāṅkaḷe kaikkoṇṭu kaṭamaiyiṟuttu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu Ari
ci Irunāḻiyum tiruviḷakkum cantirātittavaraiyum Upaiyamākac celuttak kaṭavatāṉamaikku Aruḷāl Innā
yaṉār koyilkaṇakku cūlamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ ciṅkapirāṉ kuṉṟameṟinta perumāṉ Eḻuttu tevakaṉmikaḷum
rāṉ Ātittateva(ṉ)ṉāṉa pañ �ṇ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ti coḻa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 38.437 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
